content: Ai_summary_boilerplate detection uses atomic phrase fragments in admin/validator-config.json, not only the full original template. Phase 3.2b added umbrella 'deck plans, live tracker' plus variants: 'live tracking' (gerund), 'dining venues, statoroom tours', 'historical information', 'historical information, legacy, and ship details', plus templated tells ('serves as a', 'represents the perfect', etc.). Validator tightening ships in the same PR as the cleanup batch that surfaced new hits.

verification_meta.rationale: Protected operator anchor — household weight signal.
